name: synthetic
description:
Synthetic OBFUSCATED EPUB whose footnote markers are inline styled SUPERSCRIPT by CSS (vertical-align:super, .fnmark) — NOT a literal — and whose definitions are numbered self-anchored blocks
N. text
. A same-shaped page-reference link (.pref, NOT superscript) must be IGNORED. StyledSuperscriptFootnoteDetector reads the CSS to tell the footnote marker from the page-ref, then pairs to the def by id. Locks in the antonio0101selections / Gramsci footnote case.
